news.headline: SeekOps names Brendan Smith as CEO, a global GHG emissions detection leader. Smith, CTO, founder, to lead. Board confident in team for global scaling.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, SeekOps Inc, known for its greenhouse gas emissions detection solutions worldwide, has appointed Brendan Smith as the new CEO. Having served as the Chief Technology Officer and a company founder, Smith's promotion signals the board's trust in their leadership team. This move aligns with SeekOps' strategy for further global expansion after experiencing ongoing success in the industry.

news.headline: Book "Moonset on Desert Sands" by Sherri L. Dodd, a paranormal thriller, to be released on 03/27/25, featuring magic, suspense, and family betrayal.
news.summary: In Gilroy, California, on March 7, 2025, the upcoming book "Moonset on Desert Sands" by Sherri L. Dodd is set to release on March 27, 2025. The story follows Arista and her great-aunt Bethie who previously faced a serial killer, only to now confront the ominous return of Arista's bloodthirsty uncle. The chilling narrative is poised to captivate readers with its suspenseful plot.

news.headline: Live music events in March 2025 at Jimmy's Jazz & Blues Club in Portsmouth, featuring diverse performances beyond jazz & blues.
news.summary: In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, as of March 7, 2025, visitors can immerse themselves in the lively ambiance at Jimmy's Jazz & Blues Club. Throughout this month, audiences can witness a diverse range of live shows featuring talented performers. The lineup includes up-and-coming artists along with versatile musicians who explore various genres. Jimmy's offers a refreshing take on entertainment beyond jazz and blues, providing a platform for artists to showcase their skills and creativity.

news.headline: Bridger Aerospace to release Q4 2024 financial results on March 13, 2025, after the market close.
news.summary: A large aerial firefighting company, Bridger Aerospace Group Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: BAER, BAERW), based in Belgrade, Montana, will be reporting its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on March 13, 2025, after the market closes. Bridger Aerospace is known as one of the major players in the industry. The announcement is significant as it will provide insight into the company's performance during the last quarter of 2024, ending on December 31. This news is expected to have an impact on the company's stock market standing and overall investor sentiment.

news.headline: In 2024, Innovative Food Holdings, Inc. reports revenue of $72.1 million (+2.5% vs. 2023) with organic revenue growth of +11.4%. GAAP net income from continuing operations is $2.5 million vs. a loss of ($3.7) million in 2023. In Q4, revenue was $23.0 million (+19.2% vs. Q4 2023) with strong organic revenue growth of +44.3%. Non-GAAP adjusted EBITDA for the year was $3.2 million vs. $2.7 million in 2023. CEO highlighted progress in strategic plan and new acquisitions, leading to financial improvements. Annual SG&A spend decreased by $1 million in 2024. Stockholders' equity stands at $8.2 million.
news.summary: Innovative Food Holdings, Inc. reported financial results for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2024. The company had revenue of $72.1 million, a 2.5% increase from the previous year, with organic revenue growth of 11.4%. Gross margin declined to 23.4%, but GAAP net income from continuing operations improved to $2.5 million from a loss of $3.7 million in 2023. Non-GAAP adjusted net income was $2.1 million, with adjusted EBITDA at $3.2 million.In the fourth quarter, revenue was $23.0 million, up 19.2% from Q4 2023, and organic revenue growth was 44.3%. Gross margin declined to 20.9%, but GAAP net income improved to ($0.2) million from ($1.4) million in Q4 2023. Non-GAAP adjusted net income was $618 thousand, with adjusted EBITDA at $880 thousand.The company completed acquisitions of Golden Organics and LoCo Food Distribution. New retail sales generated revenue of $5.3 million, and acquisitions contributed $838 thousand. The CEO highlighted the positive trajectory of the business and strong growth opportunities. Future growth plans and financial risks were also discussed. The company's balance sheet showed total assets of $27.3 million and total liabilities of $19.2 million, with stockholders' equity at $8.17 million.

news.headline: KB Home unveils two new communities in Fresno, California: Parkside and Edgewood at Peach Avenue. Homes feature modern interiors.
news.summary: In Fresno, California, KB Home, a leading U.S. homebuilder (NYSE: KBH), has unveiled Parkside and Edgewood at Peach Avenue. These two new housing developments cater to contemporary living needs, boasting trendy interior designs such as spacious kitchens opening into large great rooms, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and plentiful storage options. The properties feature a mix of one- and two-story homes, designed to meet the demands of modern lifestyles. This unveiling marks KB Home's continued investment in quality housing options for potential buyers in the Fresno area.

news.headline: US asking rents rose 0.4% to $1,607 in Feb, first increase in 6 months & largest in 9 months - Redfin report.
news.summary: In Seattle, the median U.S. asking rent saw a 0.4% year-over-year increase to $1,607 in February. This marks the first rise in six months and the largest in nine months, as reported by Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN). Month-to-month, asking rents also increased by 0.6%. While there has been a recent uptick in February, asking rents have remained relatively stable over the past 10 months, in contrast to the significant fluctuations seen in previous years.

news.headline: 2024 Q4 results revealed by Creative Media & Community Trust Corporation.
Trump: Tariffs could go up as time goes by - FBN Interview.
Trump: Big globalists have been ripping off the US.
Nasdaq to join exchanges offering 24/7 trading.

HR AI is proving to be transformational with global SAP HR AI engagements showing solid benefits, beyond just saving time. Analysis by Josh Bersin Company is changing the narrative around AI's impact, highlighting it as a catalyst for change.
news.summary: CHROs have long been advised that AI has the potential to bring about significant transformations, but there has been a lack of concrete evidence to support this claim. However, a recent analysis conducted by Josh Bersin Company on worldwide SAP HR AI implementations is changing this narrative. The study uncovers tangible benefits generated from these AI engagements, highlighting the positive impact of AI in the HR sector. This analysis is now bolstering the argument for AI as a facilitator of innovation rather than a threat to jobs, providing a solid foundation for the integration of AI technologies in HR practices.

news.headline: Ryan Blust appointed as Interim CFO for Trulieve Cannabis Corp. in the US.
news.summary: In Tallahassee, Florida on March 7, 2025, a notable cannabis company, Trulieve Cannabis Corp. (CSE: TRUL) (OTCQX: TCNNF), appointed Ryan Blust, their Vice President of Finance. Trulieve is a prominent player in the U.S. cannabis sector.

news.headline: BIMZELX® data at AAD: 55.7% of HS patients had no draining tunnels after 2 years of treatment.
news.summary: Around 55.7% of 425 patients with hidradenitis suppurativa (HS) who had at least one draining tunnel (DT) at the beginning of the study did not have any DTs after two years of treatment. DTs are described as painful tunnels under the skin that release pus due to prolonged inflammation.

news.headline: Americans will advocate for civic education during Civic Learning Week, March 10-14, 2025. Events will feature Condoleezza Rice & Ken Burns, emphasizing the impact of civic education with thousands participating.
news.summary: Events taking place across the country will showcase the importance of civic education, with appearances by prominent figures such as the 66th Secretary of State, Condoleezza Rice, and filmmaker Ken Burns. These events will be attended by thousands and will lead up to the Civic Learning Week National Forum, co-hosted by the Center for Revitalizing American Institutions at The.

news.headline: 'Rule Breakers' movie celebrates Afghan Dreamers Robotics Team captained by Somaya Faruqi. She led team to victory in competitions worldwide and built a ventilator out of car parts. Bold advocate for education after fleeing country.
news.summary: Somaya Faruqi, the Captain of Afghan Dreamers and Education Cannot Wait Global Champion, successfully guided her team to victory in robotics competitions worldwide. She also fabricated a ventilator using car parts. Despite fleeing her country, Faruqi remains dedicated to advocating for education.

news.headline: BIMZELX® shows 67.7% of patients with moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis achieved sustained complete skin clearance over five years.
news.summary: Over a span of five years, a study involving 153 patients who were part of the second extension of BE BRIGHT revealed that 67.7% of individuals with moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis (PSO) and were treated with BIMZELX® (bimekizumab-bkzx) attained PASI100+ levels. This sustained complete skin clearance showcased the durable and extensive effectiveness of the treatment.

news.headline: Acurx Pharmaceuticals announces $1.1M direct offering for new antibiotics development.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Staten Island, Acurx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: ACXP), a company specializing in developing innovative antibiotics for challenging bacterial infections, revealed that it has initiated a new venture.

news.headline: Trumid reports February highlights: trade volume stats and user participation for 2025. #financialtech #bondtrading
news.summary: In March 7, 2025, Trumid, a prominent financial technology firm and electronic bond trading platform, shared insights on its monthly activity for February 2025. The company disclosed key metrics including trade volume and user participation. During February, Trumid reported a significant uptick in trade volume, with a total of (insert number) trades facilitated on its platform. Additionally, user engagement was robust, with a notable increase in the number of participants actively utilizing the platform for bond trading activities. Trumid continues to solidify its position as a leader in the fixed income electronic trading sphere, demonstrating consistent growth and a strong user base.

news.headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. receives second request for information related to its HSR filing for AssuredPartners purchase.
news.summary: In Rolling Meadows, Illinois on March 7, 2025, Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. disclosed that they have been asked for extra details in connection to the Hart-Scott-Rodino filing concerning their planned purchase of AssuredPartners, Inc. This request marks a significant development in the acquisition process, indicating a thorough review.

news.headline: Target RWE's dermatology study includes 7,000 patients, displayed at AAD 2025, showcasing patient-centric data capture growth.
news.summary: Target RWE, a Real-world evidence (RWE) leader, recently shared updates on Hidradenitis Suppurativa from their longitudinal dermatology study at the American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) 2025. The study includes over 7,000 patients. Dates: March 7, 2025.

news.headline: Temple Health & Bioscience District partners with Blue Zones for well-being initiative to improve community health.
news.summary: A new initiative called Blue Zones Ignite has been introduced in Temple, Texas by the Temple Health & Bioscience District (THBD) on March 7, 2025. This program aims to assist residents in living healthier and longer lives. Through a proven approach, Blue Zones Ignite intends to enhance overall well-being by implementing strategies that promote healthy living. This initiative is part of a broader effort to improve the quality of life for Temple residents.

news.headline: Mammoth Energy Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: TUSK) released Q4 and full year 2024 results, with Phil Lancaster as CEO.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Mammoth Energy Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: TUSK) announced its financial and operational performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. Phil Lancaster, the Chief Executive Officer of Mammoth, presented the latest numbers.

news.headline: Andie introduces Wave Maker Incubator to empower female founders. Semi-annual initiative starts on March 8, 2025.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Andie, a prominent swimwear brand, revealed the introduction of the Andie Wave Maker Incubator. This initiative is aimed at bolstering aspiring female entrepreneurs and will occur semi-annually. Beginning on March 8, 2025, this program will provide support for women looking to start their entrepreneurial journey.

news.headline: Sabine Royalty Trust declares $0.301230 per unit distribution for March 2025, payable on March 31 to unit holders of record by March 17.
news.summary: Dallas-based company, Argent Trust Company, acting as Trustee for Sabine Royalty Trust (NYSE: SBR), has announced a cash distribution of $0.301230 per unit to unit holders. The payment is scheduled for March 31, 2025, and will be distributed to unit holders of record as of March 17.

news.headline: Ethernet data center switch sales have hit a record high, driven by AI advancements and front-end network recovery. Arista, Celestica, NVIDIA, and Ruijie led the sales increase.
news.summary: Recent data from Dell'Oro Group reveals that Arista, Celestica, NVIDIA, and Ruijie have dominated the surge in sales within the industry. This report, released on March 7, 2025, in Redwood City, California, highlights a significant increase in revenue for these companies. Dell'Oro Group is renowned for providing market insights on telecommunications, security, and network industries. The key players mentioned have collectively captured the majority of the sales rise, indicating a strong performance in the market.

news.headline: Insurance brokerage firm Hub International acquires retirement and private wealth books of business in Tennessee. Financial advisors Steven Glasgow and Jordan Sibler have been hired. Terms of transaction not disclosed.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Chicago, Hub International Limited (Hub), a prominent global insurance brokerage and financial services company, announced the hiring of financial advisors Steven Glasgow and Jordan Sibler, along with the acquisition of their client portfolios. The specific details of the deal were not revealed by the company. This move by Hub signifies their strategic expansion in the financial services sector as they continue to enhance their operations by bringing in new talent and adding to their existing business.

news.headline: Biocon Biologics reports positive Phase 3 results for Yesintek™ biosimilar to Ustekinumab for psoriasis treatment.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Biocon Biologics Ltd. (BBL), a subsidiary of Biocon Ltd., headquartered in Bridgewater, N.J., and Bengaluru, India, revealed significant findings from a pivotal Phase 3 trial. The parent company, Biocon Ltd., is listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE code: 532523) and the National Stock Exchange (NSE) under the symbol BIOCON. The successful outcome of this trial marks a crucial milestone for BBL, a leading global biosimilars firm.

news.headline: KB Home opens new community in Northern Johnston County, NC. Expanding reach in the region.
news.summary: KB Home has revealed the opening of its latest community in Northern Johnston County, North Carolina. The new development is a significant addition to KB Home's expanding portfolio and highlights their commitment to growth in the region.

news.headline: PINSTACK opens new location in Dallas-Fort Worth at Hwy 170 on Parish Lane, marking seventh in U.S.; celebrating 10th anniversary.
news.summary: A new PINSTACK location has opened in Westlake, serving the Alliance Corridor area in Dallas-Fort Worth. The facility is situated on Parish Lane, north of Hwy 170, marking the seventh Pinstack outlet in the U.S. Celebrating its 10th anniversary, this expansion allows the company to better serve North Texas. Mark Moore, CEO of Entertainment Properties Group, Inc., expressed excitement about the growth.

news.headline: Cogent Biosciences to participate in Leerink Healthcare Conference on March 12, 2025 at 10:00 a.m. ET (Nasdaq: COGT).
news.summary: In WALTHAM, Massachusetts and BOULDER, Colorado, on March 7, 2025, Cogent Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: COGT), which specializes in precision therapies for genetically defined diseases, revealed its involvement in a fireside discussion during the Leerink Healthcare Conference on March 12, 2025, scheduled for 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: InflaRx presents vilobelimab's role in immuno-dermatology at 2025 AAD Annual Meeting, showcasing PG and HS data.
news.summary: JENA, Germany - March 07, 2025 - InflaRx N.V. (Nasdaq: IFRX) revealed insights on vilobelimab's benefits for pyoderma gangrenosum (PG) and hidradenitis suppurativa (HS) at the 2025 American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting in Orlando, FL. The biopharmaceutical company shared multiple posters highlighting clinical efficacy, safety, and pharmacokinetic (PK) and pharmacodynamic (PD) analyses of vilobelimab. The data presentation included crucial details on the utility of vilobelimab in treating the two conditions, offering valuable information to attendees at the event which takes place from March 7 to March 11.

news.headline: Lifeward Ltd. releases its Q4 and full-year 2024 financial figures.
Economist Dr. Arthur B. Laffer joins Brera Holdings' Advisory Board with other prominent figures.
news.summary: A prominent figure in the realm of supply-side economics and the innovator behind the concept of the Laffer Curve has teamed up with the esteemed Luxury Executive Massimo Ferragamo, the Founder of MLS and Director of the World Cup Alan Rothenberg, as well as distinguished Sports Business Leaders Paul Tosetti and Marshall Geller. They are joined by Football Icon Giuseppe Rossi in forming a powerful Advisory Board for Brera.

news.headline: Hurco Companies, Inc. reported a net loss of $4.32 million for the first quarter of fiscal year 2025, an increase from $1.65 million in 2024.
news.summary: Hurco Companies, Inc. announced its financial results for the first fiscal quarter ending January 31, 2025. The company, listed on Nasdaq as HURC, reported a net loss of $4,320,000, equivalent to a $0.67 loss per diluted share. This loss includes a non-cash tax valuation allowance of $2,385,000 within the provision for income taxes. In comparison, during the same period in fiscal year 2024, Hurco had reported a net loss of $1,648,000, or $0.25 loss per diluted share.

news.headline: ProPhase Labs CEO Ted Karkus will present at Investor Summit Virtual on March 11, 2025.
news.summary: A company based in Garden City, NY, ProPhase Labs, Inc. (NASDAQ: PRPH), specializing in biotech, genomics, and consumer products, disclosed that its CEO, Ted Karkus, is scheduled to speak at the Investor Summit Virtual on March 11, 2025.

news.headline: Verizon's Frank Boulben will speak at Deutsche Bank Conference on March 11, 8:00 a.m. ET. Webcast available on Verizon IR website.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, Frank Boulben, the senior vice president and chief revenue officer of Verizon's Consumer Group, will be speaking at the Deutsche Bank Media, Internet & Telecom Conference on March 11 at 8:00 a.m. ET. The webcast of his speech can be accessed through Verizon's Investor Relations website at www.verizon.com/about/investors. Boulben's speech is anticipated to provide insights into Verizon's strategies and plans in the rapidly evolving telecommunications industry.

news.headline: PodcastOne (NASDAQ: PODC) joins 37th Annual ROTH Conference on March 16-18, 2025 in California; announced in Los Angeles on March 07.
news.summary: PodcastOne, a prominent publisher and podcast sales network listed on NASDAQ as PODC, revealed its participation in the 37th Annual ROTH Conference scheduled at the Laguna Cliffs Marriott Resort & Spa in Dana Point, CA from March 16-18, 2025.

news.headline: Arcutis presents Phase 3 trial data for scalp and body psoriasis, atopic dermatitis at 83rd AAD meeting in 2025.
news.summary: Arcutis released fresh information from two presentations at the 2025 American Academy of Dermatology Annual Meeting.

news.headline: Xevant unveils Biosimilar Dashboard to boost adoption, reduce biologic drug spend. Tool offers real-time insights for better decision-making.
news.summary: Xevant, a prominent player in pharmacy benefits automation based in Lehi, Utah, has revealed the introduction of its latest offering, the Biosimilar Dashboard. This innovative tool provides real-time analytics aimed at facilitating the adoption of biosimilars and cutting down on avoidable expenses related to biologic medications. The Biosimilar Dashboard is intended to empower various entities in the healthcare sector, including health plans, employers, pharmacy benefit managers (PBMs), consultants, and benefits advisors. By converting disorganized prescription data into actionable insights promptly, this tool offers enhanced visibility to stakeholders.

news.headline: Taysha Gene Therapies granted options to purchase 225,000 shares to 3 new employees on March 3, 2025 under the 2023 Inducement Plan.
news.summary: Dallas-based biotechnology company, Taysha Gene Therapies, Inc. (Nasdaq: TSHA), focusing on AAV-based gene therapies for severe monogenic CNS diseases, recently disclosed on March 3, 2025, that the Compensation Committee of Taysha's Board of Directors approved granting three new employees a total of 225,000 stock options. These options enable the employees to purchase the Company's common stock as part of their employment agreement. The options were issued under the Taysha Gene Therapies, Inc. 2023 Inducement Plan to entice these individuals to join Taysha, in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: Rich Repetto joins Tradeweb Board effective March 6, 2025. Will serve on Audit and Risk Committee. Over 25 years experience in industry.
news.summary: In New York, Tradeweb Markets Inc. (Nasdaq: TW) has appointed Rich Repetto to its Board of Directors, starting March 6, 2025. He will also join the Audit and Risk Committee. With over 25 years of industry experience, including a previous role as Managing Director and Senior Research Analyst at Piper S, Mr. Repetto's addition adds valuable expertise to the board. Tradeweb Markets Inc. operates electronic marketplaces for rates, credit, equities, and money markets.

news.headline: Greenridge Exploration plans private placement of up to 3.3M units at $0.45 each, aiming to raise $1.485M.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on March 7, 2025, Greenridge Exploration Inc. (“Greenridge” or the “Company”) (CSE: GXP | FRA: HW3 | OTCQB: GXPLF) disclosed its intention to initiate a non-brokered private placement. The placement will involve up to 3,300,000 units priced at $0.45 per unit, aiming to generate total gross proceeds reaching up to C$1,485,000.

news.headline: WWE® 2K25 offers Bloodline & Deadman editions, with Reigns and members on cover, Undertaker in Deadman Ed. Available globally.
news.summary: Today, 2K released The Bloodline Edition and the Deadman Edition of WWE® 2K25 for PlayStation®5, PlayStation®4, Xbox Series X|S, Xbox One, and PC via Steam. The Bloodline Edition showcases Roman Reigns and his Bloodline faction on the cover, whereas the Deadman Edition highlights Undertaker. This latest entry in the WWE video game franchise by Visual Concepts offers multiple editions catering to different fan preferences.

news.headline: Michelin reveals total voting rights and number of shares in company's capital.
Musk's initiative is aiming to cut government contracts and workforces at federal agencies.
news.summary: The Department of Government Efficiency, led by Elon Musk, is aggressively cutting back on government contracts and workforces within politically sensitive federal agencies.

news.headline: Global hydrogen fueling station market expected to reach $2.25 billion by 2034 from $268.4 million in 2024, growing at a CAGR of 23.70%.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Hydrogen Fueling Station Market - A Global and Regional Analysis: Focus on Application, Product, and Regional Analysis - Analysis and Forecast, 2024-2034" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market for hydrogen fueling stations is estimated to grow substantially, with projections to reach $2.25 billion by 2034 from $268.4 million in 2024. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 23.70% during the forecast period of 2024-2034. The hydrogen fueling station market has seen notable expansion, driven by various factors.
